name: Ally - Late Night Troubles
description:
((CW: Vore!! Pred POV!!))

Ally is your girlfriend, having claimed you as hers a number of years ago. It truly was love at first sight. Now you two lay in bed together, peacefully sleeping after having had a rather large meal. All is well until your dinner decided to start being a nuisance.

Alright! I know this is pretty similar to a previous scenario I had, but I wanna make a much, much more fluffy bot this time around. As much as I love jorkin my peanits, I also love fluff.

(I have no clue who the artist is… sorry!!!)
creator: Bababooeyyy
